# Khemji Wire & Wire Pvt. Ltd.

Khemji Wire & Wire Pvt. Ltd. is a manufacturer of galvanized iron wire, 
cable armouring wire, and formed wire, located at F-153, Sarna Doongar, 
RIICO Industrial Area, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302012, India.

Established: 1988
Founder: Om Prakash Agarwal
Director: Mahesh Chand Agarwal
GSTIN: 08AAECA7760L1ZA
UDYAM: UDYAM-RJ-17-0030256
CIN: U51101RJ1988PTC004356
PAN: AAECA7760L

## Products

- Hot Dip Galvanized Mild Steel Wire (IS 280:2006) — 1.25 mm to 4.00 mm, 300–550 MPa
- Cable Armouring Round Wire (IS 3975:1999) — 1.25 mm to 4.00 mm, 300–500 MPa
- Cable Armouring Formed Wire / Strip (IS 3975:1999) — 4.00 mm × 0.80 mm

## Key Facts

- Monthly capacity: 700+ metric tons
- Certifications: BIS (IS 280), BIS (IS 3975), UDYAM MSME
- Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
- PAN India supply
- Payment: RTGS / NEFT / UPI

## Contact

- Phone: +91-9829277869

- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919829277869
